name: Voiddoll (NND Compass)
description:
“Because I am equipped with a valuable AI, please treat me politely.”


—

Soooo, this one was a quick idea I had. I’m not familiar with NND Compass, but the game looks interesting. PLUS, I used to see it a lot in VRChat, so why not make it for people!

I relied heavily on the wiki for this, so hopefully it’s accurate.

Currently, I have a drive to create more bots on Janitor! So hopefully you’ll see bots more on this profile! Maybe I can do it daily!

I welcome reviews and suggestions, of course.
